basic_details.job_title: ICMR BMHRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Professor, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (ICMR BMHRC)
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (ICMR BMHRC) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR BMHRC Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Post Graduate Medical Degree, Super Speciality Degree (DM/M.Ch) as applicable
qualification.details: Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms. Associate Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms. Assistant Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms.

salary_details.details: Professor: Rs. 1,23,100 - 2,15,900 Per Month Associate Professor: Rs. 78,800 - 2,09,200 Per Month Assistant Professor: Rs. 67,700 - 2,08,700 Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR BMHRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR BMHRC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR BMHRC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR BMHRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR BMHRC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms. Associate Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms. Assistant Professor: MBBS with PG Degree and Super Speciality Degree (DM/MCh) as per NMC norms.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Professor: Rs. 1,23,100 - 2,15,900 Per Month Associate Professor: Rs. 78,800 - 2,09,200 Per Month Assistant Professor: Rs. 67,700 - 2,08,700 Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR BMHRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICMR BMHRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the ICMR BMHRC Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts is 14th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for the recruitment drive. This includes 3 posts for Professor, 4 posts for Associate Professor, and 9 posts for Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the ICMR BMHRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible candidates as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a Post Graduate Medical Degree and a Super Speciality Degree (DM/M.Ch) as applicable, as per NMC norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ICMR BMHRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1500 for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post. For Professor, it ranges from Rs. 1,23,100 to Rs. 2,15,900 per month. For Associate Professor, it is Rs. 78,800 to Rs. 2,09,200 per month, and for Assistant Professor, it is Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ICMR BMHRC recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online through the official website of ICMR BMHRC. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading documents, and paying the fee if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to SC/ST, OBC, PwD, and Ex-Servicemen categories as per the prevailing Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the official website of ICMR BMHRC. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
